description_long: This object features a traditional Japanese sushi meal presented on a rectangular wooden serving board. At the center, a white ceramic plate with a blue rim holds two pieces of nigiri sushi: one topped with a pink slice resembling tuna and the other with a yellow slice resembling tamago (egg), both resting on a green garnish. To the side of the plate, a small round dish contains a green mound of wasabi. A pair of wooden chopsticks is neatly placed on the board, parallel to its longer edge. The overall arrangement is clean and minimalist, evoking a classic sushi dining experience.
description: A wooden board holds a ceramic plate with two pieces of nigiri sushi, a wasabi dish, and a pair of chopsticks, arranged in a minimalist style.
description_view_0: The sushi set is viewed from above, showing the plate with two nigiri pieces, chopsticks on the left, and a wasabi dish on the right.
description_view_1: From the front, both sushi pieces are visible with the wasabi dish in the foreground and chopsticks partially visible behind the plate.
description_view_2: This rear view shows the sushi plate with chopsticks on the right and the wasabi dish on the left, highlighting the sushi toppings.
description_view_3: From the opposite end, the chopsticks are fully visible in the foreground, with the sushi plate and wasabi dish behind them.
